manifest.summary: Classify repo changes into deterministic AOS developer workflow actions without relying on session memory.

steps.reason: Prove the AOS developer control surface owns the build flow; use raw build.sh only if ./aos cannot run.
AOS-backed verification depends on daemon ownership, Accessibility, and Input Monitoring readiness.

human_handoffs.instruction: Stop automated repair loops and tell the human the repo-mode aos permission grant is stale; they must remove and re-add aos in Accessibility and Input Monitoring.

next: Run step_001, then continue in order unless a human handoff condition is hit.
